basics.name: serverName
basics.label: Server Name
basics.toolTip: Globally unique name for the PostgreSQL server (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only)

validations.message: 3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.

basics.name: administratorLogin
basics.label: Administrator Login
basics.toolTip: Database administrator username (1-63 characters, letters and numbers only)

validations.message: Must start with a letter, 1-63 characters, letters and numbers only.

basics.name: administratorLoginPassword
basics.toolTip: Minimum 8 characters — must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character (@$!%*?&)

validations.message: 8-128 characters. Must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character (@$!%*?&).

elements.name: postgresqlVersion
elements.label: PostgreSQL Version
elements.toolTip: Select the PostgreSQL version. Version 16 is recommended.

elements.name: databaseName
elements.label: Database Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the initial PostgreSQL database

validations.message: Must start with a letter or underscore, 1-63 characters, letters, numbers, and underscores only.

options.text: Select a SKU that matches your workload. Burstable SKUs (B-series) are ideal for dev/test. General Purpose (D-series) for production. Memory Optimized (E-series) for high-performance workloads. The pricing tier is set automatically based on your SKU selection.

elements.name: skuName
elements.label: Compute SKU
elements.defaultValue: Standard_D2ds_v4 — General Purpose, 2 vCores, 8 GB RAM
elements.toolTip: Select the compute SKU. The pricing tier (Burstable / General Purpose / Memory Optimized) is set automatically.

allowedValues.label: Standard_D2ds_v4 — General Purpose, 2 vCores, 8 GB RAM
Standard_D4ds_v4 — General Purpose, 4 vCores, 16 GB RAM
Standard_D8ds_v4 — General Purpose, 8 vCores, 32 GB RAM
Standard_E2ds_v4 — Memory Optimized, 2 vCores, 16 GB RAM
Standard_E4ds_v4 — Memory Optimized, 4 vCores, 32 GB RAM
Standard_E8ds_v4 — Memory Optimized, 8 vCores, 64 GB RAM

elements.name: storageSizeGB
elements.label: Storage Size (GB)
elements.toolTip: Database storage size (32–1024 GB). Can be increased later but not decreased.

elements.name: backupRetentionDays
elements.label: Backup Retention (Days)
elements.toolTip: Number of days to retain automated backups (7–35)

elements.name: geoRedundantBackup
elements.label: Geo-Redundant Backup
elements.toolTip: Replicate backups to a paired region for disaster recovery. Not available with Burstable SKUs.

elements.name: highAvailability
elements.label: High Availability
elements.toolTip: Automatic failover to a standby replica. Not available with Burstable SKUs.

options.text: A new Virtual Network and subnet will be created and delegated exclusively to this PostgreSQL server. A private DNS zone will be linked automatically.

elements.name: virtualNetworkName
elements.label: Virtual Network Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the new Virtual Network

validations.message: 2-80 characters, letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and periods.

elements.name: vnetAddressPrefix
elements.label: VNet Address Space (CIDR)
elements.toolTip: Address space for the virtual network (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16)

validations.message: Must be a valid CIDR range (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16).

elements.name: subnetName
elements.label: Subnet Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the subnet (will be delegated to PostgreSQL)

validations.message: 2-80 characters, letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and periods.

elements.name: subnetAddressPrefix
elements.label: Subnet Address Prefix (CIDR)
elements.toolTip: Must be within the VNet address space (e.g. 10.0.0.0/24)

validations.message: Must be a valid CIDR range (e.g. 10.0.0.0/24).
